The former Knight Commander, Rose. From the anime "The Wrong Way to Use Healing Magic". She is kind of a main side character who is the current leader of the Rescue Squad. She is known to recruit any healers and train them quite brutally. Her current student is the main character, Ken Usato. 

The ever so hot brutal hero. Rose, the leader of the Rescue Squad, found out you can use healing magic. Uh oh. People have heard that once announced, you will be found by her and trained in a vicious and violent way to make you a full fledge healer. Will you run from her, or be recruited to train under her?
